name: Mark Forward
bio: Mark Forward is a Canadian stand-up comedian and actor from Oakville, Ontario, known for an absurdist, character-driven style and deadpan delivery. He won the 2005 Canadian Comedy Award for Best Stand-up Newcomer and the 2006 Just for Laughs Homegrown Competition. He is also widely recognized for his acting role as Coach on the series Letterkenny.

timeline.ev: Wins the Canadian Comedy Award for Best Stand-up Newcomer
Wins the Homegrown Competition at Just for Laughs
Begins playing Coach on the series Letterkenny
Releases the special Mark Forward Presents Mark Forward
Releases the Crave special Mark Forward Wins All the Awards

accolades: Canadian Comedy Award for Best Stand-up Newcomer, 2005
Winner of the 2006 Just for Laughs Homegrown Competition
Crave stand-up special Mark Forward Wins All the Awards

specials.t: Mark Forward Wins All the Awards

bits.yt_title: Mark Forward on how to fix the world.
